title: GlossaryTerm
description: A defined business term with synonyms, classification tags, authority links to external vocabularies, and links to related terms.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

name.description: The canonical name of the term (e.g. "Date of Birth").

definition.description: The authoritative definition of the term.

synonyms.description: Alternative names or abbreviations for this term (e.g. ["DOB", "birth date"]).

tags.description: Classification tags (e.g. PII category tags) applied to this term.

authorityLinks.description: Links to definitions of this term in external authority systems.

relatedTerms.description: URNs of related GlossaryTerms. Pattern: urn:srcos:glossary:<id>
